title: Interdictor-class cruiser
content:

Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] *[[Sith Triumvirate]] }} {{Quote|Sith Interdictor ship! They must've been waiting for us in the hyperspace route. We're caught in their tractor beam.|[[Carth Onasi]]|}} The '''''Interdictor''-class cruiser''', also known as the '''hyperspace interdiction cruiser''', the '''''Interdictor''-class capital ship''', the '''''Interdictor''-class Sith destroyer''',''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' the '''''Interdictor-class''''' '''star cruiser''',{{LucasArts|url=games/swkotor_sithlords|text=''Chronicles of the Old Republic''|int=Chronicles of the Old Republic}} or the the '''''Interdictor''-class warship''' was among the most numerous [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] seen in action with the [[Sith armada (Jedi Civil War)|Sith armada]] during and after the [[Jedi Civil War]].''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' ==Characteristics== [[File:Leviathan.jpg|thumb|left|180px|One of the most famous ''Interdictor''s, the ''Leviathan''.]] The ''Interdictor''-class was 600 meters long and featured a [[Hull/Legends|hull]] that split into two structures, one dorsal and one ventral. The ship was propelled by three main thrusters and four auxiliary thrusters, similar to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]. Each ship was commanded from a sternward tower. The ''Interdictor''-class cruiser was armed with 5 medium [[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] cannon batteries, 6 light [[Point-defense laser cannon/Legends|point-defense cannon]] batteries, 3 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] batteries, and 4 [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]]. The infamous ''Interdictor''-class cruiser and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] warship, the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']] was equipped with 20 [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]], 4 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons, 2 [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and a [[Tractor beam projector/Legends|tractor beam projector]]. The Sith warships made by the Star Forge rivaled [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' ==History== The class name "Interdictor" was first proposed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jimas Veltraa]]. When Veltraa was killed in the [[Mandalorian Wars]], some proposed that the name of the class be changed to honor him, but this was overruled by [[Tol Cressa|the Supreme Chancellor]]. In [[3963 BBY]], construction on the ''Interdictor''-class was approved.{{KOTORbackups|13}}
[[File:Interdictor_and_Forays.jpg|thumb|200px|An Interdictor-class cruiser fires on two [[Foray-class blockade runner|''Foray''-class blockade runners]].]]
The original prototype ''Interdictor''s were manufactured by [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]]. Like the [[Inexpugnable-class tactical command ship|''Inexpugnable''-class command ships]], the ''Interdictor''-class cruisers were built at [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]], though many more would be constructed by the [[Star Forge]] to fuel the growing warfleet of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]]. The most notable ''Interdictor''-class Cruiser was the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that was said to be the only vessel in the class that came out of the shipyards in a space-worthy state. It was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]], who defected with the ship to join the Sith Lords Revan and [[Darth Malak|Malak]]. The ship was duplicated in the Star Forge and produced by the hundreds. The ''Leviathan'' itself continued to serve as Karath's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] up until his death. [[File:LeviathanEngines_kotor.jpg|thumb|left|200px|''Interdictor''-class, stern-view.]] Malak, in the ''Leviathan'', brought a fleet of ''Interdictor''s to [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] and positioned them around that [[Planet/Legends|world]] in an attempt to stop the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] [[Bastila Shan]] from escaping. Frustrated that the search for the missing Jedi was taking too long, he ordered his fleet to [[Destruction of Taris|bombard Taris]] with their [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], turning the [[Upper City]] into slag. Some time later, a number of ''Interdictor''s participated in the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]], which bore witness to the destruction of the Star Forge and the mass production of ''Interdictor''-class ships and [[Sith fighter]]s. Despite that, many of the remaining ''Interdictor''-class cruisers were later used to form the core of [[Darth Nihilus]]'s Sith battlefleet and were seen in action at the [[Battle of Telos IV]]. Millennia later, the overall design principles survived in the Galactic Republic and later in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in the form of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] line of warships. Sienar, known under the Empire as [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], went on to make the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]], which was equipped with a superior form of gravity well projector.''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Revanconfronted.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] confronted on the bridge of [[Darth Revan's flagship|his flagship]].]] According to the ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'', the ''Interdictor''-class was built by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], a company which would not exist until the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The company at the time of the Mandalorian Wars was still called Republic Sienar Systems. The [[1998]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] program ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' includes a glossary entry for the "''Interdictor''-class cruiser." However, as this entry notes, the term is intended to apply to the Immobilizer 418 cruiser and should not be confused with the ''Interdictor''-class cruiser of the ''KotOR'' series.''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' mistakenly refers to an ''Interdictor'' type of ship, misusing an early name for the class that appeared in strategy guides and walkthroughs for ''Knights of the Old Republic''. ==Appearances== *{{KOTORbackups|13}} {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II:
